name: mijia-control
description: Control Xiaomi/Mijia smart home devices (lights, AC, heaters, robots, cameras) through MCP. Includes web dashboard, REST API, CLI, SocketIO, energy monitoring, and automation rules.

tools.name: list_devices
tools.description: List all Xiaomi smart devices with their IDs, names, models, and online status.

tools.name: get_device
tools.description: Get device details including specs, available properties and actions.

tools.name: get_property
tools.description: Read a device property value such as brightness, temperature, or power state.

tools.name: set_property
tools.description: Set a device property value to control devices (turn on/off, adjust brightness, set temperature).

tools.name: run_action
tools.description: Execute a device action such as starting robot cleaning or playing music.

tools.name: list_scenes
tools.description: List all Xiaomi smart home scenes.

tools.name: run_scene
tools.description: Execute a smart home scene to trigger all preset device operations.

tools.name: list_homes
tools.description: List all homes with device overview.

tools.name: get_home
tools.description: Get home details including all devices in that home.
